lesson.menu_desc: Reading meeting minutes + reported speech -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 14 -- Follow-ups & Action Items
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Patrícia Xavier Lima Iwashita | Aula 14 -- Follow-ups & Action Items

reading.rtitle: Customer Success Sync — Meeting Minutes & Action Items
paras: These are the minutes of our weekly Customer Success sync. The meeting started on time, and everyone shared a quick update. Priya said that the new dashboard was finally ready for the client. David told the team that the data migration had finished over the weekend. We agreed that the client should see real value before the renewal call.

Next, we turned the discussion into clear action items, each with an owner and a due date. The first task is the onboarding deck. Patrícia is the owner, and it is due on Friday. David said he would send the technical notes by Wednesday, so she can finish the slides. Priya told us that she would book the training session once the deck was approved. We assigned the follow-up email to the support team.

Before we wrapped up, we reviewed the items that were still outstanding. The billing question from last week is not done yet, so we will circle back to it on Monday. The team also said that the health score report was almost ready. Finally, we agreed on the next step: Patrícia will share these minutes with the client today, and everyone will confirm their tasks by the end of the day.
reading.source: Adapted for class use from a customer success team's meeting minutes

gist.prompt: What is the best one-line summary of these minutes?
choices: It is a price quote for a new dashboard and a training session.
It records what the team agreed and lists the action items, owners and due dates.
It is a complaint email about a billing problem from last week.

items: Priya said the new dashboard was ready for the client.
Priya said that the new dashboard was finally ready for the client.
Patrícia is the owner of the onboarding deck, and it is due on Friday.
Patrícia is the owner, and the deck is due on Friday.
The billing question from last week is already finished.
The billing question is not done yet; the team will circle back to it on Monday.
David told the team he would send the technical notes by Friday.
David said he would send the technical notes by Wednesday, not Friday.
In your own syncs, who usually owns the action items, and how do you track the due dates?
The minutes report what people agreed ("Priya said that..."). Why is it useful to report decisions this way?
What happens on your team when an action item is still outstanding after the due date?

listenings.text: Hi Patricia, this is David, leaving you a quick voice note after our Customer Success sync, just to recap the action items so nothing falls through. On the call, Priya said the new dashboard was finally ready, so we can start the client's onboarding this week. I told the team I would send the technical notes by Wednesday, and you said you would finish the onboarding deck by Friday. That deck is the main task right now, and you are the owner, so I will not touch it. Priya told us she would book the training session once the deck is approved, and we assigned the follow-up email to the support team. One thing is still outstanding: the billing question from last week is not done yet, so let us circle back to it on Monday. Could you share the minutes with the client today and ask everyone to confirm their tasks? Thanks, and talk soon.

Hi Patricia, this is Priya, just following up after the sync with a short note from my side. I wanted to confirm the action items I own, so we stay aligned. In the meeting, I said the dashboard was ready, and that is still true; the client logged in this morning and really liked it. I also told the team I would book the training session, but I have one question. You said the onboarding deck would be due on Friday, so should I wait for the final deck before I send the training invite, or can I book a provisional date now? I do not want the training to become an outstanding item next week. The other thing is the health score report. I said it was almost ready, and I will send it to you by Thursday, before the renewal call. Let us circle back tomorrow if anything changes. Thanks for keeping the minutes so clear; it really helps me track my tasks.
